name: Colby College
meets_full_need_notes: Colby meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Colby eliminated loans from financial aid packages in 2014. All aid is grant-based. Colby Promise guarantees full need met with no loans for all four years.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based aid as RD applicants. Aid offer released with admission decision. Students may withdraw if aid is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Colby accepts appeals based on changed circumstances. Students submit documentation for professional judgment review.
